goal: Use https://codepen.io to generate an HTML PPT-style output with balanced content structure and visual effects.
constraints: Use only public pages and assets.
Prioritize clear section hierarchy and balanced slide-like layout.
Include visual effects that do not break readability.

fields.name: html_structure
fields.description: Generated HTML contains title, section blocks, and consistent semantic structure.

fields.name: content_balance
fields.description: Content is distributed across sections with balanced text density and clear visual rhythm.

fields.name: visual_effects
fields.description: Uses tasteful animations, gradients, shadows, or transitions while preserving readability.
